title: Enhancing Sweet Sorghum Ethanol Value Chain
abstract:
Biofuels are among renewable energy sources that offer greater hope for future energy requirements. At the same time, biofuels are considered as one of the factors af fecting global food prices. However, the certain finality of fossil fuel depletion and  the continued environment pollution caused by excessive use of fossil fuels make it 
imperative to find alternative renewable sources that complement the fossil fuels  with limited/little impact on environment.
funders: Common Fund for commodities ( CFC) , The Netherlands
